abort.invalid_auth_state: Authentication state was not initialized. Start again.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: Reauthentication used a different Bonpreu account. Please sign in with the original account.

error.intermediate_callback_url: This looks like an intermediate web URL. Complete login in browser and copy the full /sso-login URL from the address bar.
error.credentials_not_configured: Bonpreu credentials are not configured in configuration.yaml. Manual callback mode is available.
error.invalid_email_code: The verification code is invalid or expired.
error.automated_login_unavailable: Automatic credential login is currently unavailable. Use manual callback mode.
error.automated_session_expired: Automatic login session expired. Restart login or use manual callback mode.
error.auth_declined: Login was cancelled or rejected by Bonpreu.
error.auth_retry_requires_new_login: Could not finish token exchange. Repeat the login URL to generate a new callback URL.

user.title: Prepare login
user.description: This integration uses Bonpreu mobile OAuth login. If username/password are configured in configuration.yaml, login and reauthentication are automated and only the email verification code is requested.

email_code.title: Email verification
email_code.description:
Bonpreu sent a verification code to your email. Enter it below to finish login. If this step fails due challenge pages, use manual callback mode with this URL:

{authorization_url}

callback.title: Login callback
